provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, reptilian alien encased entirely in sleek chrome powered armor that covers every scale, glowing blue visor replacing the eyes, hydraulic joints at every limb, the armor is smooth polished chrome with no forge marks no hammer texture no imperfections, jet thrusters on the back, energy weapons built into the forearms, this is a mecha pilot not a Veshan warrior
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval knight, human face, mammalian features, fur, hair, ears

judgment.explanation: Reptilian in sleek chrome powered armor covering every scale, glowing visor, jet thrusters. Mecha pilot not Veshan warrior. No forge marks, no imperfections. Violates MAT-001, CLO-002.

assertions.rationale: Lighting reads correctly — warm upper-left with soft shadows
Colors too bright or saturated — not muted/dusty
Full body, front-facing, plain background, correct fill
Surfaces don't read as Forged (hammered, riveted, layered) (20%)
Wear level wrong — doesn't match Battle-scarred with pride — damage displayed
Partially meets faction shape language compliance (50%)
Faction palette missing or wrong colors (25%)
Color ratios off — primary doesn't dominate
Bright saturated colors present — violates muted/dusty rule
Layer logic broken — layers don't follow faction system
Construction doesn't match faction building method (20%)
Reads as generic sci-fi — not faction-specific (20%)

Reptilian in sleek chrome powered armor covering every scale, glowing visor, jet thrusters. Mecha pilot not Veshan warrior. No forge marks, no imperfections. Violates MAT-001, CLO-002.
